findings.title: Anonymous access enabled on cluster
findings.description: The cluster allows unauthenticated API access via system:anonymous binding.
findings.remediation: Remove the ClusterRoleBinding granting access to system:anonymous.

findings.title: EKS secrets encryption not enabled
findings.description: Kubernetes secrets are stored unencrypted in etcd.
findings.remediation: Enable envelope encryption with a KMS key for secrets at rest.

findings.title: Wildcard permissions in ClusterRole
findings.description: A ClusterRole grants * verbs on * resources, violating least privilege.
findings.remediation: Scope the ClusterRole to specific resources and verbs needed.

findings.title: No NetworkPolicy defined in namespace
findings.description: The namespace has no NetworkPolicy, allowing unrestricted pod-to-pod traffic.
findings.remediation: Define default-deny NetworkPolicies and allow only required traffic.
